code.description: The locale where the merchant anticipates their business to be located; often referred to as the Accept-Language in HTTP headers.

merchantDescription.description: Description of the primary merchant tied to the transaction and responsible for providing the products or services (description of the business, what they do, markets, etc.). Used to help cardholder understand business responsible for the charge.

defaultLocale.description: This indicates whether or not this locale will be used as the default locale for displaying information to the customer.
